headline: How The AutoZone (AZO) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Growth And Margins
summary: AutoZone’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly, moving from US$4,225.38 to US$4,204.74, a change of about US$20.64 per share that keeps the target firmly in the US$4,000s. This tweak comes as Street research circles around a tight range of price targets and debates how commercial growth, margins, weather disruptions, and recent same store sales trends fit together. Read on to see how these shifting views could shape the next phase of the AutoZone story, as well as what to watch as...
